title: davallia immersa
intro: Davallia immersa, also known as the tropical Davallia or water fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Davalliaceae and is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and the Pacific Islands. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Davallia immersa include reducing inflammation and pain, treating wounds and skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and rhizomes of Davallia immersa are often used to make teas, infusions, and ointments, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
